Keeps only last 7 days. Storage bounded.
"To summarize, we traced one user action through the system:
6 patterns, each solving a specific problem."
Tracker creates session, fires event on close
Observers react: save, refresh UI, check limits
Data persisted via Repository + swappable Strategy
User checks stats, report built via Builder
On startup, data older than 7 days is purged
Wrap up: 6 patterns, each solving one problem
